beats.narration_text: Yassou — this is Liam, in for Bear. Today: explainer-deepen, the skill that asks whether a one-minute doodle earned its length — and if it didn't, converts it into something deeper without touching the original.

props.runningText: auditing against Brown Blue depth standard...

beats.narration_text: The skill has two moving parts: a runnable audit script that scores any beat_sheet dot json against ten checks, and a conversion path that rewrites the concept — not the script — into Brown Blue depth. The audit and the rewrite are kept separate on purpose.

The pipeline: audit the doodle, hard gate if it already passes, then lift only the concept — extract the insight and the objects, discard the pacing. Write the deep script and stop for Gate one approval. From there, Brown Blue's own beats-audio-manim pipeline takes over.

props.title: Audit → lift → convert.

phases.label: GATE
phases.note: already PASS? stop — never rewrite a passing video

phases.label: LIFT
phases.note: extract insight + objects + equations; discard pacing

phases.label: SCRIPT
phases.note: Gate 1: deep script.md + audit table for approval

phases.label: BUILD
phases.note: beats → audio → manim → assemble via brownblue

props.footerNote: Target: <slug>-bb/ sibling. Source doodle is never touched.

beats.narration_text: Self-demo: run the audit on claude-liam-sketch-explainer, a video already in this series.

props.runningText: scoring beat_sheet.json against Brown Blue standard...

beats.narration_text: The scorecard: two critical failures. No instance beats before the abstraction, and an equation with no tangent. Five warnings on top. Verdict: needs B-B conversion. This is a real audit on a real video in this batch — the two failing criticals are exactly what the skill exists to catch.

props.title: AUDIT — claude-liam-sketch-explainer
props.code:
=== claude-liam-sketch-explainer — NEEDS-BB-CONVERSION ===
[CRIT] PASS  pure Manim (no doodle render)
[CRIT] PASS  duration >= 120s              172.4s
[CRIT] FAIL  >=2 INSTANCE before ABSTRACTION  found: 0
[CRIT] FAIL  equation tangent when present  equation, NO tangent
[CRIT] PASS  no lecture red (#C8102E)       clean
[warn] FAIL  series = Brown Blue
[warn] FAIL  font = EB Garamond
[warn] FAIL  slug ends -bb
[warn] FAIL  3b1b beat roles tagged         found: ['HOOK']
[warn] FAIL  BOUNDARY beat                  missing
-> convert: 2 critical failures

beats.narration_text: Mechanism one: the audit rubric. Ten checks, five critical. Fail any critical and the verdict is needs-B-B-conversion — the rest are warnings that shape the rewrite. The gate is real: a doodle that already passes is never rewritten. The skill's first job is to find nothing to do.

props.heading: Ten checks. Five are critical.
props.body: The audit scores every beat_sheet.json against the Brown Blue standard. Critical failures force conversion. Warnings shape the rewrite. The gate is hard in both directions: a passing doodle is never touched, and a failing one is never shipped as-is.
props.quote: Never 'convert' a video that already passes the audit.

beats.narration_text: Mechanism two: lift the concept, not the script. Conversion doesn't port the doodle's sentences into a longer video. It reads the doodle to find the one insight, the concrete hook, the exact objects. Then it discards everything else and writes Brown Blue from scratch around that insight.

props.heading: Lift the concept, not the script.
props.body: Conversion extracts the one insight, the concrete case, and any equation from the doodle. The doodle's pacing and register are discarded. Brown Blue is written fresh around what the doodle was actually teaching — not around what the doodle said.
props.quote: you keep what it teaches, not how it sketched it.

beats.narration_text: Mechanism three: depth comes from instances and the tangent, not length. Brown Blue runtime is a consequence of pedagogy — two moving instances before each abstraction, a tangent on every landed equation, a boundary beat at the end. These earn the duration. Padding does not.

props.heading: Instances earn the runtime.
props.body: Brown Blue length is not a target — it's what falls out when the pedagogy is complete: two moving instances before each abstraction, a tangent beat on every equation, a BOUNDARY beat naming what is not taught. Add instances until the abstraction lands. Then stop.
props.quote: depth comes from instances and the tangent, never from padding.

beats.narration_text: Explainer-deepen: the audit scorecard, the lift law, and the depth law in one pipeline. It protects the source doodle, forces a gate before any audio spend, and hands off to Brown Blue for everything downstream.

artifactLines: lift law: keep the insight, discard the pacing
depth law: instances + tangent earn the runtime

beats.narration_text: Your turn. Run the audit on any doodle in your library. When it fails: what is the one insight it carries? What two concrete instances would make the abstraction land without filler? Start there.

props.runningText: what is the one insight your doodle carries?
output: run the audit — does it pass or fail?
if it fails: what insight does it carry?
what two concrete instances make the abstraction land?
convert only what the audit flags

beats.narration_text: Claude, Deepened. I'm Liam, in for Bear.
